flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Saint Elizabeth University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (688 → 557).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Saint Elizabeth University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (40.2% vs 47.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Elizabeth University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Elizabeth University rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (38.6% → 51.1%).
